_rationale: index_stats mode=references: same as mode-symbols, both binaries currently ignore the mode argument and emit standard index_stats payload. Locks the references-mode dispatch entry point so a future regression that special-cases one mode (and breaks references) is caught even before the per-mode payloads diverge. Probe: /tmp/parity-iter4/index_stats___mode___references.{go,cpp}.json — both return ready-state body. Same shape divergences as mode-symbols (timestamp form, total_size_bytes, key order). Single-shot timing residue (Go async / C++ sync) still applies. See mode-symbols and wait-ready for full divergence catalogue.

tiers._rationale_stable: Envelope only. Locks dispatch + no-throw + content[].type='text' frame; tighter text-body parity blocked on the same async-vs-sync timing + serialization-shape divergences documented on mode-symbols.
tiers._rationale_ignore: Same as mode-symbols: single-shot timing mismatch + Go/C++ payload-shape diff on timestamp serialization.
